publications.title: Phase III trial of pembrolizumab for metastatic melanoma treatment
publications.abstract: Randomized controlled trial demonstrates 65% overall response rate and 24-month progression-free survival in 850 patients with metastatic melanoma treated with pembrolizumab.

publications.title: Novel biomarkers for early detection of pancreatic cancer
publications.abstract: We identified a panel of 12 circulating biomarkers with 92% sensitivity and 89% specificity for detecting stage I pancreatic cancer in high-risk populations.

publications.title: CAR-T cell therapy for refractory B-cell lymphoma
publications.abstract: Chimeric antigen receptor T-cell therapy achieves 78% complete remission rate in patients with refractory B-cell lymphoma, with manageable toxicity profile.

publications.title: Genetic risk factors for coronary artery disease in diverse populations
publications.abstract: Multi-ethnic GWAS of 250,000 individuals identifies 85 loci associated with coronary artery disease, including 30 novel variants in non-European populations.

publications.title: Long-term outcomes of bariatric surgery for severe obesity
publications.abstract: 15-year follow-up study of 5,000 patients shows sustained weight loss, improved metabolic parameters, and reduced mortality with bariatric surgery.

publications.title: Precision medicine strategies for triple-negative breast cancer
publications.abstract: Genomic profiling identifies actionable mutations in 68% of triple-negative breast cancers, enabling targeted therapy selection and improved outcomes.

publications.title: Epidemiological trends in type 2 diabetes incidence worldwide
publications.abstract: Global analysis reveals 8.5% annual increase in type 2 diabetes incidence, with highest rates in South Asia and Middle East regions.

publications.title: Therapeutic targeting of PD-L1 in non-small cell lung cancer
publications.abstract: Anti-PD-L1 antibody atezolizumab demonstrates 45% objective response rate and 18-month median overall survival in advanced NSCLC patients.

publications.title: mRNA vaccine platform for rapid pandemic response
publications.abstract: Modular mRNA vaccine platform enables vaccine development within 48 hours of pathogen identification, with demonstrated efficacy against multiple viral families.

publications.title: Diagnostic accuracy of AI-assisted radiology for lung nodule detection
publications.abstract: Deep learning algorithm achieves 96% sensitivity and 94% specificity for detecting malignant lung nodules on CT scans, outperforming radiologists.
